name: Banana Orange Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: sugar, baking soda, raisins or dried figs, vegetable oil, orange juice, vanilla extract, baking powder, and salt (if using). Mix well.
4. Add the egg and egg whites to the dry ingredients. Mix until moistened.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 60 to 70 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
8. Cool completely before serving.
